original_snippet_context: Report on the opening market in Santos.
relevant_quote: The whole snippet is relevant due to its indirect link to the debate, and hence to how it could inform related debates, which is not yet clear.
justification: The text provides market data about exchange rates, but doesn't express any explicit or implicit opinion about the "Caixa de Conversão" itself. It could inform other analysis, so it cannot be fully discarded, but it has a limited role to play per se.
